programs.title: Health Explored S2 - "Open Air Life Part 2"
programs.desc: Go sea to summit with a skiing experience, as we trek to an unskiied peak, then go diving in the frozen ocean.

programs.title: Health Explored S2 - "Sands of Time Part 1"
programs.desc: From environmental health to physical health, discover what coastal life is like in Morocco before heading inland to the desert.

programs.title: Secret Wars Uncovered S1 - "The Gaza Offensive"
programs.desc: A mixture of political frustration and violent challenges led to the Gaza Offensive in 2014. As so many times over the past 13 years, Israeli soldiers launched brutally into the streets of Gaza, leaving destruction and death in their wake.

programs.title: War Machines S1 - "Mastering Arms"
programs.desc: A weapon that has built Empires, toppled Kingdoms, and slaughtered millions, the story of the gun and how it has evolved throughout the centuries is long.

programs.title: War Machines S1 - "Advancing Destruction"
programs.desc: This episode tells the story of that journey showcasing both big and the small artillery and the impact they have had on warfare.

programs.title: War Machines S1 - "Triumphant On Land"
programs.desc: Highlighting some of the most influential movers ever to take to the battlefield including some of the most infamous tanks.
